title: Hela Madiry
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Hela}} {{Conflicting|''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''|''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''}} {{Character |type=CIS |image= |name=Hela Madiry |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', in which Hela Madiry is [[Death/Legends|killed]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]]''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]{{CSWECite|II|274|Madiry, Hela}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hello, trooper.|Hela Madiry to Ordo Skirata|}} '''Hela Madiry''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Clerk/Legends|clerk]] in the accounting division at the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] [[logistics center]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], broke out, she secretly relayed information to a Separatist [[Separatist terrorist network|terror cell]] operating on Coruscant. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Ordo Skirata]], a [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]] (ARC) working with a Republic anti-[[Terrorist/Legends|terror]] [[Kal Skirata's strike team|strike team]], after her role as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] was discovered by his group. With assistance from another Null-class ARC, [[Mereel Skirata]], Ordo assassinated her with two shots to the head using a modified [[Verpine shatter gun|Verpine rifle]] while she was out having lunch. ==Biography== {{Quote|Can you disrupt that holocam circuit for me on my mark?''"
"''I can do it without leaving my seat, ner vod.''"
"''Okay, I'll give you a reminder to kill the cam when I'm five meters from her.|Ordo and Mereel Skirata, planning Hela Madiry's death|}} Hela Madiry was a [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who lived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|broke out]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Madiry was employed as a [[Clerk/Legends|clerk]] in the accounting division of a [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] (GAR) [[logistics center]] located at [[Coruscant Command HQ]]. She had several distant cousins on [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]], a planet that underwent a [[Political coup on Jabiim|coup]] and whose [[Jabiim Congress|congress]] later declared support for the Separatists.[[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]] At some point during the war, Hela began secretly providing information about GAR [[Troop/Legends|troop]] movements to a Separatist [[Separatist terrorist network|terror cell]] operating on Coruscant. [[File:ARC_Captain_Ordo.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Ordo Skirata, a Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]] Her identity as a [[Spy/Legends|mole]] was uncovered following a series of [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] [[Bomb/Legends|bombings]] targeting military facilities on Coruscant. The revelation came from the [[Gurlanin]] [[Changeling/Legends|shapeshifter]] [[Jinart]], who had been spying on the Grand Army logistics center for her own agenda. In exchange for the Republic's agreement to remove its [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Colonist/Legends|settlers]] from her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]], Jinart provided [[Kal Skirata]], the leader of a Republic anti-terror [[Kal Skirata's strike team|strike team]], with information on all active Separatist spies within the logistics center. Following this, [[Ordo Skirata]], a [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]] (ARC) and a member of Kal Skirata's strike force, went to the logistics center to [[Death/Legends|assassinate]] Madiry. He found her in a nearby public courtyard, reading a [[holozine]] and eating a [[Mealbread/Legends|mealbread stick]] for lunch. Disguised as a regular [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]], Ordo hid his modified [[Verpine shatter gun|Verpine rifle]] inside a document holder, approached calmly, and shot her twice in the head and once in the chest, killing her instantly. To cover his tracks, he was assisted by another Null-class ARC, [[Mereel Skirata]], who deactivated the [[Holocamera/Legends|holocamera]] in the area before Ordo carried out the kill. ==Personality and traits== Madiry had the look of an unassuming civilian approaching retirement. She preferred spending her lunchtime at a nearby public courtyard rather than the logistics center cafeteria. ==Behind the scenes== Hela Madiry first appeared in [[2006]] in ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', the second novel in [[Karen Traviss]]'s ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series. According to Madiry's entry in the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', Ordo entered her office in the logistics center and killed her. However, in the novel, he shot her in the head in a public courtyard outside the facility while she was having lunch. This article assumes ''Republic Commando: Triple Zero''{{'s}} depiction to be the correct series of events. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Hela Madiry }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Madiry, Hela}} [[Category:Clerical workers and assistants]] [[Category:Confederacy of Independent Systems individuals]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Grand Army of the Republic personnel]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Spies]]
